chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc: Application No.S-263 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection at flag-A 2. For hearing of main application. 18.07.2025 Mr. Ayaz Ahmed Noonari, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Rukhsar Ahmed Junejo, Advocate for respondent No.1 & 2. Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, Deputy Prosecutor General...-..-...-..-..-..-..-..- Learned counsel, after arguing the matter has stated that he wishes to withdraw the Cr. Misc: application, if directions given to learned trial court to proceed with the matter expeditiously. It is noted that the applicant has sought cancellation of bail granted to Gulzar and Ali Hassan. The above noted misc: application is dismissed as withdrawn. With directions to the learned trial Court to proceed with the matter and decided the same within two months, after receipt of this order. Hence application dispose of accordingly. JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
